turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hello do u like animals i have a kitten named leela very cute kitten too

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i love animals ! i have a dog named allie , and i adore her .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: animals are amazing my kitten sits in my lap while i youtube cause i am a big youtuber

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: oh wow , that sounds interesting . are you really famous ?

turns.content: not yet but in time i will be

turns.content: what are your videos about ? ever make a spooky halloween video ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: oh , well that still might be useful . i really like putting on makeup for costumes .

turns.content: but sometimes i fly to them since my father is a pilot for a major airline
